paper.title: Crb polarity evidence fixture paper
paper.conversation_summary: Extract evidence-backed findings from a known paper fixture.

chunks.text: Figure 2A. Crumb is essential for maintaining epithelial polarity in the embryo.
Crb is required for epithelial polarity during early embryogenesis and localizes to the apical membrane.
Shotgun localized to adherens junctions but the manuscript did not report a verified polarity phenotype result.
